creator: stdcall@bk.ru
text:
My mouse doesn't work. It's a Defender Chameleon 7930L (optical, PS/2).
I've tried all protocols in 'sysinstall', but I hadn't see a moving cursor.
When I started KDE, cursor appeared in the bottom of the screen, but it was moving only to the right-bottom corner independently of direction in that I moved the mouse.

How-To-Repeat: Buy the same mouse :)
